ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stores" (
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each store */,
  "store_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the store type */,
  "competition_distance" INTEGER /* Distance to the nearest competitor */,
  "promo2" INTEGER /* Indicates if the store participates in Promo2 */,
  "competition_since_months" INTEGER /* Number of months since the nearest competitor opened */,
  "promo2_since_weeks" INTEGER /* Number of weeks since the store started Promo2 */,
  "opening_date" TEXT /* Date when the store opened */,
  "size_sqft" INTEGER /* Size of the store in square feet */,
  "parking_capacity" INTEGER /* Number of parking spaces available */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stores_store_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_type_id") REFERENCES store_types ("store_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "store_types" (
  "store_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each store type */,
  "store_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the store type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the store type */,
  "avg_store_size" REAL /* Average size of stores of this type in square feet */,
  "avg_employees" INTEGER /* Average number of employees in stores of this type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("store_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales record */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the sales record */,
  "sales_amount" REAL /* Amount of sales on the given date */,
  "school_holiday" INTEGER /* Indicates if it was a school holiday */,
  "state_holiday_0" INTEGER /* Indicates if it was a regular state holiday */,
  "state_holiday_christmas" INTEGER /* Indicates if it was a Christmas holiday */,
  "state_holiday_easter" INTEGER /* Indicates if it was an Easter holiday */,
  "state_holiday_public" INTEGER /* Indicates if it was a public holiday */,
  "day_of_week" INTEGER /* Day of the week (0-6, where 0 is Sunday) */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season (e.g., winter, spring, summer, fall) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "promotions" (
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each promotion */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the promotion */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the promotion */,
  "promotion_type" TEXT /* Type of the promotion */,
  "discount_percentage" REAL /* Discount percentage offered by the promotion */,
  "target_audience" TEXT /* Target audience for the promotion (e.g., students, seniors) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("promotion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_promotions_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "holidays" (
  "holiday_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each holiday */,
  "holiday_name" TEXT /* Name of the holiday */,
  "holiday_type" TEXT /* Type of the holiday (e.g., state, school, public) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the holiday */,
  "impact_on_sales" TEXT /* Impact of the holiday on sales (e.g., high, low, medium) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("holiday_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assortments" (
  "assortment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assortment type */,
  "assortment_type" TEXT /* Type of the assortment (e.g., a, b, c) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the assortment type */,
  "avg_product_count" INTEGER /* Average number of products in this assortment type */,
  "avg_product_price" REAL /* Average price of products in this assortment type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assortment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "store_assortments" (
  "store_assortment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each store-assortment relationship */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store */,
  "assortment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assortment type */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the store started carrying this assortment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the store stopped carrying this assortment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("store_assortment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_store_assortments_assortment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assortment_id") REFERENCES assortments ("assortment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_store_assortments_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "months" (
  "month_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each monthly sales record */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the sales record */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the sales record */,
  "sales_amount" REAL /* Amount of sales for the given month */,
  "avg_sales_per_day" REAL /* Average sales per day for the given month */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("month_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_months_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "days_of_week" (
  "day_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each daily sales record */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the sales record */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the sales record */,
  "day_of_week" INTEGER /* Day of the week (0-6, where 0 is Sunday) */,
  "sales_amount" REAL /* Amount of sales for the given day */,
  "avg_sales_per_hour" REAL /* Average sales per hour for the given day */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("day_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_days_of_week_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "store_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistical record */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the statistical record */,
  "store_mean_sales" REAL /* Mean sales for the given year */,
  "store_median_sales" REAL /* Median sales for the given year */,
  "store_std_dev_sales" REAL /* Standard deviation of sales for the given year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_store_statistics_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., manager, analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the user's password */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "data_requested" TEXT /* Type of data requested (e.g., sales, promotions) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "store_locations" (
  "store_location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each store location */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the store */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the store is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the store is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the store */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the store location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the store location */,
  "store_manager" TEXT /* Name of the store manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("store_location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_store_locations_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "store_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the performance record */,
  "sales_growth_rate" REAL /* Sales growth rate for the given year */,
  "customer_satisfaction_score" REAL /* Customer satisfaction score for the given year */,
  "employee_turnover_rate" REAL /* Employee turnover rate for the given year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_store_performance_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "store_competitors" (
  "competitor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each competitor */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store */,
  "competitor_name" TEXT /* Name of the competitor */,
  "distance" INTEGER /* Distance to the competitor */,
  "since_months" INTEGER /* Number of months since the competitor opened */,
  "competitor_size" INTEGER /* Size of the competitor in square feet */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("competitor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_store_competitors_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather record */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the weather record */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature in degrees Fahrenheit */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Precipitation in inches */,
  "cloud_cover" REAL /* Cloud cover percentage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback record */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the feedback */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Customer rating (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Customer comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_feedback_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)
